name: Temperature Lapse Rate Calculator
description: Estimate standard atmosphere temperature change with altitude.
formulaDescription: Uses standard lapse rate (6.5°C per 1000m) to estimate temperature change with altitude.

example.explanation: At 1000 m altitude, temperature drops by about 6.5°C from sea level standard 15°C.

faqs.question: What is a lapse rate?
faqs.answer: A lapse rate is the rate at which air temperature decreases with an increase in altitude.
